creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text: Although I have committed some changes but it actually doesn't resolve the problem mentioned here fully. For the actual fix we have to rewrite the entire rc script. For an idea you can have a look at the rc script of buildbot itself. Currently there is a helper script named buildbot-worker which actually should be used to start/stop the service rather than using it with twisted. Currently I am a short of time and will have a look at this at the next weekend(not the coming one). Keeping this ticket open for now.
